quotes.text: Beware of little expenses; a small leak will sink a great ship.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Do not save what is left after spending, but spend what is left after saving.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Never spend your money before you have it.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Too many people spend money they earned to buy things they don’t want.
quotes.author: Will Rogers

quotes.text: Money is a terrible master but an excellent servant.
quotes.author: P.T. Barnum

quotes.text: A budget is telling your money where to go instead of wondering where it went.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: You must gain control over your money or the lack of it will forever control you.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: Do not go broke trying to look rich.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: Financial peace isn’t the acquisition of stuff; it’s learning to live on less.
quotes.author: Dave Ramsey

quotes.text: He who buys what he does not need steals from himself.
quotes.author: Swedish Proverb

quotes.text: Never depend on a single income; make investments to create a second source.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Time is more valuable than money; you can get more money, but not more time.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: The quickest way to double your money is to fold it and put it back in your pocket.
quotes.author: Will Rogers

quotes.text: If you would be wealthy, think of saving as well as getting.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: A fool and his money are soon parted.
quotes.author: Thomas Tusser

quotes.text: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
quotes.author: Ben Graham

quotes.text: In investing, what is comfortable is rarely profitable.
quotes.author: Robert Arnott

quotes.text: Wide diversification is only required when investors do not understand what they are doing.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: The real measure of your wealth is how much you’d be worth if you lost all your money.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Opportunities come infrequently; when it rains gold, put out the bucket.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: Chains of habit are too light to be felt until they are too heavy to be broken.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.text: It’s not how much money you make, but how much money you keep.
quotes.author: Robert Kiyosaki

quotes.text: The art is not in making money, but in keeping it.
quotes.author: Proverb

quotes.text: Money often costs too much.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: The safest way to double your money is to fold it over once.
quotes.author: Kin Hubbard
